runs.cmd:
python3 -c "
import json
d=json.load(open('.context/framework-gaps.json'))
arr=[v for v in d.values() if isinstance(v,list)][0]
for it in arr:
    if 'tool_operations' in json.dumps(it) or 'composite' in json.dumps(it).lower():
        print(it.get('id'), it.get('status'), '|', it.get('title','')[:160])
"

FGAP-126 closed | The eight pi-only auth-gated tools have no non-interactive invocation path, and the gate refuses the ceremony while passing the composite that embeds its effect

"

runs.cmd:
python3 -c "
import json
from collections import Counter
for f in ('.project/framework-gaps.json','.project/issues.json'):
    d=json.load(open(f))
    arr=[v for v in d.values() if isinstance(v,list)][0]
    pp=[it for it in arr if it.get('package')=='pi-project']
    print(f, 'pi-project items:', len(pp), dict(Counter(it.get('status') for it in pp)))
"

grep -nE 'Per-scope finding registries|Mandates as a typed block|Applicability predicate language|render-time pagination primitive|seedExamples short-circuit|Plan primitives: loadPlan|PLAN- prefix collision' .project/framework-gaps.json .project/issues.json | grep '"title"'
